scenario: West Maui flash flood - live situation feed
note: Synthetic 'live' situation updates for the same 14:00-14:59 HST window as mock-user-location-feed.json. Apply updates in time order to get the situation at any moment. Three things evolve: (1) the recommended evacuation target starts at Kihei Community Center and switches to War Memorial Gym at 14:38 after Route 30 south closes and Kihei floods - which is why the matching location feed turns north at Maalaea; (2) the flood footprint grows as a coast_dist threshold of 0.5 -> 1.5 -> 3.0 km, pulling more areas into risk; (3) shelter resources at War Memorial Gym deplete from full to critical as evacuees arrive.

updates.text: Flood Watch for West Maui. Low-lying coastal Lahaina at risk of flooding.

updates.route_note: South on Honoapiilani Hwy (Route 30) through Maalaea to Kihei.
updates.reason: West Maui flood watch; Kihei is south of the West Maui flood footprint and the shelter is transit-accessible.

updates.text: Flash Flood Warning. Evacuate low-lying areas of West Maui immediately and move to higher ground.
Move to designated shelters now. Avoid flooded roads.
Honoapiilani Hwy closed north of Lahaina due to flooding.
Floodwaters rising fast in Lahaina town; residents urged to leave. Some streets reporting shelter-in-place.
Flooding spreading inland in West Maui. Maalaea now under flood advisory.
Route 30 closed south of Maalaea toward Kihei due to flooding and debris.
Low-lying Kihei now reporting street flooding; shelter access roads affected.

updates.route_note: From Maalaea, take Route 30/380 NORTH to Wailuku. Do not continue south to Kihei.
updates.reason: Route 30 south of Maalaea is closed and Kihei is flooding. War Memorial Gym (Wailuku) is the open inland reception shelter.

updates.text: Flooding now affecting areas up to ~3 km from the coast across West and South Maui.
War Memorial Gym water and canned-food supplies running low as evacuees arrive.
Kihei Community Center is not accepting new arrivals due to flooding and capacity.
War Memorial Gym critically low on water and canned goods; resupply ETA ~16:00. Bring your own water if you can.
War Memorial Gym at cot capacity; overflow seating on the gym floor. Water resupply en route.
